Description.SourceString:
Not a lot can be said about small spears of metal to be launched at high speeds into your opponent. They do exactly what you think they’ll do to the target, and it’s rarely pretty.

Guards would buy crossbow bolts in bulk from the village blacksmiths, giving him a steady income. This sadly had the side effect of making the village blacksmith the number one most regularly broken into location.
